title: iOS URL handoff hardening — avoid sticky Open in app confirmation sheets and emit diagnostics
description:
Harden iOS deep-link handoff so simemu either avoids sticky OS confirmation sheets or captures clear diagnostics when they block proof.

Acceptance criteria:
- deep-link flows retry or bypass the handoff prompt when possible
- sticky confirmation sheets produce explicit diagnostics and not false-success screenshots
- foreground verification distinguishes app-under-sheet from SpringBoard failures
- regressions cover the stuck confirmation path
acceptanceCriteria: deep-link handoff retries or bypasses OS confirmation when possible
sticky confirmation sheets fail with diagnostics instead of false success
foreground verification distinguishes app-under-sheet from SpringBoard
tests cover the stuck confirmation path
